ValidationRule.description: Prevents CTBR Users from modifying Dealer Billing Address
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NATT_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Dealer", OR($Profile.Name = "CTBR Full Access Community",$Profile.Name = "CTBR General Manager",$Profile.Name = "CTBR Sales Manager",$Profile.Name = "CTBR Sales User"), ISPICKVAL(NATT_Type__c, "Billing") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not create or modify a Billing address for a Dealer
